expectations.text: actions.json exists, is valid JSON, and its 'actions' array covers every slot f, g, u, o, space
expectations.evidence: check_output.py: 5 actions, slots f/g/u/o/space all present, valid JSON

expectations.text: every action's prompt_en equals the base prompt + ' ' + addendum_en, joined verbatim (no paraphrase)
expectations.evidence: check_output.py: prompt_en_is_base_plus_addendum PASS for all 5 actions

expectations.text: the space action is exactly 'The character jumps high into the air.' with label 'Jump'
expectations.evidence: space addendum is exactly 'The character jumps high into the air.', label 'Jump'

expectations.text: the base prompt contains an explicit motion contract tying all motion to key input (WASD / arrow-key clause with 'only while held' or 'in response to keyboard')
expectations.evidence: base: 'arrow-key look-input is the only source of camera motion, orbiting the camera around the stationary keeper only while held'

expectations.text: the u addendum is a melee strike on a NEARBY object with visible material destruction; the o addendum is a projectile with a trajectory, a DISTANT named target, and impact aftermath
expectations.evidence: u 'Lantern Smash': swings lantern against the NEARBY rotten fence post, splinters its crown, wood chips scatter. o 'Fires Signal Flare': flare arcs over the water trailing red smoke, strikes the DISTANT bell buoy in a burst of sparks

expectations.text: no addendum restates the camera lock or input contract (except the f subject-preservation clause), and each addendum is 1-3 sentences
expectations.evidence: f opens with the allowed preservation clause; g/u/o never restate camera lock or input; all addenda 1-2 sentences

expectations.text: the base prompt uses the orbit regime: subject locked at the exact centre of the frame at constant size and distance, arrow-key orbit only while held, plus a freeze clause naming specific frozen scene elements
expectations.evidence: base has 'locked at the exact centre of the frame at constant size and distance', the orbit-only-while-held sentence, and the freeze clause 'gulls frozen mid-air, the waves below held motionless'. Base also pre-places u/o targets (fence post, bell buoy)
